meta.title: Ao no Kiseki / Trails to Azure item English localization candidates
meta.match_rule: Direct match by numeric item id.
notes: English names come from the user-provided items JSON files.
Rows absent from the source files are intentionally left untranslated.
Descriptions are retained in JSON for reference but not rendered in the Markdown glossary.

items.en_desc: A leather-bound book that police detectives wield.\nUsed to store investigation progress and helpful information.
A notebook used to record learned recipes.\nFood can be made with the right ingredients.
A notebook used to record information on fish caught.
A notebook used to record information from enemy encounters.
A map of Crossbell State.\nCan be used to find your current location.
A comprehensive map of Crossbell City for tourists.\nA dependable ally for exploring the city.
Can't expect much attack power, but it's better than\nnothing?
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Lloyd and Wazy 'Strike Heaven.'
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Elie and Noel 'Southern Cross.'
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Noel and Wazy 'Blue Breaker.'
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Randy and Noel 'Howling Raid.'
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Elie and Wazy 'Akashic Star.'
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Tio and Noel 'Blast Hammer.'
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Randy and Wazy 'Last Rebellion.'
An ancient tome that describes how to perform a powerful\ncombo craft. Teaches Tio and Wazy 'Sigma Ascension.'
A versatile, easy-to-use rod designed to provide\nyou with the full freshwater fishing experience.
A rod that allows the wielder to feel the faintest of\nstrikes. Suited to catching small to medium-sized fish.
A simple rod whose line is directly attached to its tip.\nReliable in a pinch, it can even haul in big game.
Gear designed to use live bait for big catches.\nA match for any fish--no matter the size.
A miracle-working rod left behind by a legendary angler.\nCapable of using all varieties of bait.
[STR+15/Prevents Seal]\nA ring decorated with beautiful, deep-water coral.
[ATS+15/Prevents Mute]\nAn eye-catching ring with a beautiful marble effect.
[ACC+50％/Prevents Blind]\nCrescent-shaped glasses that emit a faint light.
[ADF+30/Prevents Burn]\nA necklace set with water sepith.
[SPD+10/Prevents Freeze]\nA good-luck charm carried by hikers to combat the cold.
[EVA+15％/Prevents Petrify]\nKnit with strange thread that shines with seven colors.
[MOV+2/SPD+5/Prevents Sleep]\nFitted with bells that emit a refreshing sound.
[STR+10/ATS+10/Prevents Faint]\nA steel bracelet that presses tightly against the wrist.
[ACC+10％/EVA+10％/Prevents Confuse]\nA bottle-shaped charm filled with a soothing fragrance.
[STR+10/Zeit Only]\nA gift from the kids in the city. Very, very chewy.
[STR+25/DEF+25/EVA-100％]\nA glorious medal given to the winner of an anglers' duel.
[SPD+10/MOV-2]\nA marveliferous medal given to the winner of an anglers' duel.
[ATS+25/ADF+25/ACC-10％]\nA refined medal given to the winner of an anglers' duel.
[DEF+25/ADF+25/Prevents Stat Down]\nA sturdy medal given to the winner of an anglers' duel.
[ACC+50％/SPD+5/Prevents Ailments]\nA lustrous medal given to the winner of an anglers' duel.
[RNG+2/ACC+10％]\nIncreases the precision and firing range of orbal guns.
[MOV+1/SPD+2]\nA cute hood with cat ears. Mewls audibly when pressed.
[DEF+5/EVA+5％]\nA cute attachable Mishy tail. Meeheehee! ☆
[DEF+10/EVA+15％]\nA hat with Mishy's face on it. Now you can be Mishy, too!
[RNG+3/ACC+30％]\nA charming pair of Mishette gloves. Ya gotta hand it to her!
[SPD+10/Drop Rate+30％]\nMishette's yellow ribbon. Eek! You found me. ☆
[CP Gain Up/Team Rush Chance Up]\nAn emblem inscribed with runes. Boosts one's resolve.
[STR+25/DEF-25/CP Gain Up]\nA truly motivating headband. Raises CP gained in battle.
[STR+50/DEF-50/Auto-CP Up]\nA truly motivating belt. Automatically recovers CP in battle.
[STR/DEF/ATS/ADF+100/SPD/MOV+5/ACC/EVA+10％]\nThe highest honor awarded to those who carry out justice.
[ACC+50％/Prevents Deathblows/Drop Rate+30％]\nAn ornate emblem that brings its bearer great fortune.
[Prevents Ailments/Stat Down/Delay]\nA mystical crown that protects its wearer from harm.
[STR/DEF/ATS/ADF+200/SPD/MOV+10/ACC/EVA+20％]\nA mystical crown that grants its wearer powers untold.
[EVA+10％/Zeit Only]\nAn expensive shampoo that results in a sleek coat.
[Prevents Poison]\nA silver brooch blessed by the Goddess Aidios.
[Prevents Seal]\nA ring decorated with beautiful, deep-water coral.
[Prevents Mute]\nAn eye-catching ring with a beautiful marble effect.
[Prevents Blind]\nCrescent-shaped glasses that emit a faint light.
[Prevents Burn]\nA necklace set with water sepith.
[Prevents Freeze]\nA good-luck charm carried by mountain climbers to ward off the cold.
[Prevents Petrify]\nKnit with strange thread that shines with seven colors.
[Prevents Sleep]\nFitted with bells that emit a refreshing sound.
[Prevents Faint]\nA steel bracelet that presses tightly against the wrist.
[Prevents Confuse]\nA bottle-shaped charm filled with a soothing fragrance.
[Prevents Deathblows]\nA gold chain blessed with sacred prayers.
[Prevents Seal/Mute]\nA treasure from the East with the power to break seals.
[Prevents Poison/Blind/Burn]\nA pendulum-shaped accessory with a moon etched in it.
[Prevents Freeze/Petrify]\nA pendulum-shaped accessory with a sun etched in it.
[Prevents Faint/Sleep/Confuse]\nA pendulum-shaped accessory with stars etched in it.
[RNG+1]\nIncreases the firing range of orbal guns.
[SPD+5/Prevents Delay]\nAn award in recognition of a detective's great achievements.
[STR+10/Team Rush Chance Up]\nAn award for brave detectives. Boosts team morale.
[SPD+15]\nAn award for remarkable achievement. Dispels all hesitation.
[CP Gain Up]\nA motivating headband. Raises CP gained in battle.
[Auto-CP Up]\nA motivating belt. Automatically recovers CP in battle.
[Prevents Ailments]\nAn accessory modeled on an artifact passed down in the church.
[DEF+30/Prevents Poison]\nA chain-stitched bracelet blessed with the power of Aidios.
[STR+10/ATS+10/Prevents Seal/Mute]\nA jewel engraved with a moon. Has the power to break seals.
[ACC+50％]\nAn excessively adorable strap with a doll of Mishy's sister, Mishette, attached.
[Prevents K.O. once (revives with full HP/EP/CP)]\nFully revives on K.O., but breaks afterward.
[ATS+100/SPD+5/Prevents Poison/Blind/Burn]\nA gem made from high-purity sapphirl. Emits a blue glow.
[STR+100/SPD+5/Prevents Freeze/Petrify]\nA gem made from high-purity carnelia. Emits a red glow.
[ACC+20％/EVA+20％/SPD+10/Prevents Faint/Sleep/Confuse]\nA gem made from high-purity esmelas. Emits a green glow.
[DEF+100/ADF+100/SPD+10/Prevents Seal/Mute]\nA gem made from high-purity amberl. Emits an amber glow.
[SPD+5]\nA very lightweight, handmade hat made of straw.
[DEF+15]\nA very sturdy helmet with the safety symbol on it.
[SPD+3/ACC+10％]\nThin medical gloves that protect delicate fingers.
[ADF+15]\nA commemorative coin with a curled-up cat engraved on it.
[ADF+20/MOV+2]\nA commemorative coin with a leaping frog engraved on it.
[DEF+20/ADF+20/Prevents Deathblows]\nA locket blessed with Thaumaturgy to protect its holder.
[EVA+5％]\nA toy from the East that spins in the wind.

Cancels enemy arts and crafts with 60％ success rate.
Cancels enemy arts and crafts with 90％ success rate.

HP slowly recovers on the field.

Automatically analyzes defeated enemies.

Enemies more likely to notice you on the field. (Affects whole party.)
Increases enemy item drop rate by 100％.
Displays enemies on mini map. (Affects whole party.)

See detailed information about enemies without analyzing.
Displays treasure chest locations on mini map. (Affects whole party.)

Grants a STR boost in battle.
Grants a DEF/ADF boost in battle.
Grants an ATS boost in battle.
Grants a SPD boost in battle.
Raises HP/ADF. Killing enemies restores HP.
Raises EP/ATS. Killing enemies restores EP.
Raises STR/HP. Increases the chance of critical strikes.
Raises ATS. Increases potency of HP recovery arts.
Raises ADF/SPD. Prevents ailments and stat down.
Raises DEF/ADF. Grants complete immunity under certain criteria.
Raises STR/ATS. Obtain sepith from attacks.
Raises SPD. Grants a STR/ATS/SPD boost in battle.
Raises DEF/ADF. Automatically recover from K.O.
Raises SPD. Increases potency of items.

Raises EP. Offensive arts have a chance to deal critical damage.
Raises STR/ATS. Attacks/Arts recover HP/EP.
Raises DEF/ADF/SPD. HP/EP/CP regenerate on field.
Raises ATS/ADF/SPD. Absorbs magic attacks.

Magic attacks get stronger the less HP you have.
Raises STR/ATS. Attacks/Arts recover HP/EP.
Bony chops packed with gamey flavor.\nThe more you chew, the stronger you feel.
A twitchy, wriggling cut of fish.\nDespite being dead, it's surprisingly lively.
A highly nutritious monster shell.\nProduces a flavorful stock when stewed.
A perfectly round egg packed with vitality.\nBoth the yolk and white are highly nutritious.
A thin, sparkling, semi-transparent wing.\nWhen ground into a powder, it can be used as seasoning.
A plant monster's seed with a hard outer layer.\nPeeling it open reveals a juicy pome.
A wobbly, mysterious mucus.\nDespite its appearance, it has a smooth texture.
Vitamin-rich brown rice that has just begun to germinate.\nBoth healthy and delicious.
A fermented paste made from five kinds of granulated rice.\nEffective no matter what dish it's in.
A liquor with a mild taste. Heals the body and mind.\nAlways drink in moderation.
Still has the morning's dew shining upon it.\nCan be brewed into tea.
An aromatic grass with a refreshing scent.\nIts flavor is unusual, but those who like it are addicted.
Whole grain black pepper.\nPacked with zesty flavor.
A deep red spice that has an intense kick.\nWarms the body when consumed.
A cooking oil made from sesame seeds.\nHealthy, refreshing, and most of all, delicious.
High-quality honey made in Armorica.\nIts invigorating flavor is widely popular.
Rock salt crushed to a coarse consistency.\nTingly and briny from the second it hits the tongue.
Wheat flour that smells freshly milled.\nA key ingredient for breads, noodles, and sweets.
Freshly squeezed milk. One glass a day is recommended\nto promote health and growth.
Artfully crafted cheese.\nIts tantalizing flavor has an irresistible lip-smacking zing.
Eggs laid just this morning.\nThose with a refined palate eat them raw over a bed of rice.
A sour, wild strawberry native to Crossbell.\nNamed after the fruit's unique bell-like shape.
An alluring, jet-black mushroom with a glazed coating.\nWhen pressed, it excretes a flavorful extract.
Mysterious beans that seem to gleam with seven colors.\nVariations in preparation yield notably different results.
A crispy potato with outstanding flavor.\nSo good, you'll want to keep it all for yourself.
A spring onion whose gentle taste complements any recipe.\nOnce chopped, it is ready for any boiled or grilled dish.
A small carrot that is as sweet as a fruit.\nPopular in both classic cuisine and desserts.
A new variety of tomato cultivated in the Liberl Kingdom.\nExceptionally bitter, yet oddly addictive.
A high-grade cut of meat with moderate fat content.\nJust lightly scorching the meat releases all of its juices.
A fresh fillet of springy white meat. Guaranteed to bring\nout a smile the moment it hits your taste buds.
A small fish known for its beautiful fins, soothing colors,\nand graceful swimming.
[Bait] A small crab as white as snow.\nIt can be used as live bait.
A small fish with brilliant blue and white stripes.\nPopular in aquariums.
[Bait] A small fish with silver scales.\nHandy as live bait for big fish.
A small fish found in the Armorica region.\nDistinguished by its green body.
A small turtle with a golden carapace.\nSluggish on land, but swift in the water.
A beautiful variety of rockfish with scarlet speckles.\nOften swallows carnelia.
An overly cautious medium-sized fish.\nTypically lurks in the shadows of rocks.
A medium-sized fish that likes to eat sepith.\nIts rainbow stripes are especially distinctive.
A carnivorous fish that is nonetheless pleasing to the eye.\nSo brutal, it will eat birds resting on the water's surface.
[Bait] A freshwater fish known for its longevity.\nIt can be used as live bait to catch big game.
A carnivorous fish that will eat anything with a\ngreedy hunger.
A medium-sized fish with steel-blue scales.\nThe males and females have different feeding habits.
A medium-sized fish with uniquely shaped fins. Though\nelegant in appearance, it can be quite temperamental.
A variety of rockeater that prefers cold water.\nIt swims downstream after spawning.
A medium-sized amphibian that lives in stagnant waters.\nUnpleasant in appearance, but said to be tasty.
A migratory fish that swims upstream during mating season.\nRoe can be collected from inside its body.
A medium-sized fish that resembles a sunset.\nThey leap out of the water, making them a popular attraction.
A rare fish with a snake-like appearance.\nConsidered medically effective for restoring vitality.
A large turtle with a sturdy shell.\nHas no fear, even when ridden by humans.
A large freshwater crab with sharp claws.\nIts entire body is dyed a pale pink.
A large fish with magnificent, metallic scales.\nEvery angler yearns to catch one.
A large fish that lives in the mud below the water's surface.\nIt uses its long whiskers to examine the environment.
A large, golden fish not commonly seen.\nConsidered a sign of wealth and good fortune.
A large, flexible amphibian.\nIts body shimmers and lets off a mysterious pale glow.
A rare, beautiful carp with white and scarlet scales.\nCommands a sense of majesty and elegance.
A giant, teal-colored fish with a gorgeous, jewel-like\ncarapace. One of the Guardians of Crossbell.
A giant fish with striking, amber-colored stripes.\nOne of the Guardians of Crossbell.
A giant fish whose entire body is bathed in a bloody\ncrimson. One of the Guardians of Crossbell.
A giant fish with a blue body that resembles the sky.\nOne of the Guardians of Crossbell.
An unusually large fish.\nRules the waters as the 'King of Crossbell.'
Shining red salmon eggs. Often found when\nfishing up trout and rockeaters.
Fishing bait made by grinding vegetables into paste.\nAttracts various types of carp.
Red larva of a winged insect. Bait for small fish,\nsuch as kasagins and azelfish.
A creature that lives underground. Squiggles and squirms\ngrotesquely, but fish love them.
Special bait developed by the Fisherman's Guild\nwith a recipe made to attract a wide range of fish.
A specialty fishing bait developed by the Fisherman's Guild.\nExpensive to make, but capable of luring large catches.
A value pack of fishing baits. Contains one of each:\nEarthworm, Dumplings, Deluxe Dumplings, Roe, and Red Flies.
[Restores 30％ HP/CP+50]\nGlistening noodles in a deep red broth.
[Restores 10％ HP/CP+25]\nSubtly spicy noodles that are famous in the Harbor District.
[CP+100 or Fall to Critical HP]\nPerilous noodles that can mean life or death.
[Restores 75％ HP/Restores EP 75％/CP+75]\nRejuvenating mapo tofu from the masters of the East.
[Restores 40％ HP/Restores 40％ EP/CP+40]\nCarefully prepared mapo tofu with medicinal properties.
[CP+200 or Fall to 0 CP and Critical HP]\nMapo tofu that boils ominously. Fortune favors the bold.
[Revives & Restores 15％ HP]\nMade by a seasoned chef. Simple ingredients, rich umami flavor.
[Revives & Restores 5％ HP]\nFast, cheap, delicious. The most beloved Eastern dish.
[Restores 5％ HP/Cures Stat Down]\nPartially burned fried rice. It's better than it sounds.
[Restores 40％ HP/STR+50％]\nA high-grade cut whose savory flavor is taken to its limit.
[Restores 20％ HP/STR+50％]\nA hearty, nutritious steak that revitalizes the body.
[Restores 10％ HP/Physical Immunity]\nTough meat. Far too tough, actually.
[Restores 30％ HP/Cures Ailments]\nStew slowly simmered for three days and nights.
[Restores 10％ HP/Cures Ailments]\nA highly nutritious stew that has been patiently simmered.
[Restores 15％ HP/Restores 15％ EP/CP+15]\nAn over-boiled stew that has become a goopy mess.
[Restores 60％ HP/Cures Petrify]\nA first-rate hotpot brimming with the bounties of the land.
[Restores 30％ HP]\nA filling hotpot of meat and vegetables; made to be savored.
[Restores 10％ HP/Cures Petrify/Freeze]\nA rustic dish that makes use of nature's yield. Ignore the taste.
[Restores 60％ HP/Cures Burn]\nA first-rate seafood hotpot that will move you to tears.
[Restores 25％ HP/Cures Burn]\nA flavorful hotpot filled with the bounty of the waters.
[Restores 10％ HP/Cures Poison/Blind/Burn]\nThe day's catch served simply. Just don't look too close...
[Restores 10％ HP/SPD+50％]\nA superb fish fry that makes you feel more nimble.
[Restores 5％ HP/SPD+25％]\nFried fish with a light, crispy texture.
[Attack - STR 300 - Line - K.O. (25％)]\nOver-fried fish that, by mistake, now resembles a dart.
[Restores 60％ HP/CP+30]\nNow with a 50％ greater flavor and serving size.
[Restores 40％ HP/CP+20]\nArmorica's famous handcrafted omelet with rice.
[Attack - STR 350 - Area (L) - Burn (80％)]\nAn omelet turned explosive due to a chemical mishap.
[Restores 50％ HP/Cures Seal/Mute]\nUnmatched pasta that cleanses the body and mind.
[Restores 25％ HP/Cures Seal]\nRefreshing herb pasta with a fresh look to match.
[Attack - STR 450 - Area (M) - Faint (100％)]\nPasta-turned-deadly-weaponry by a bizarre quirk of fate.
[Restores 30％ HP/CP+30]\nDouble the burger, double the benefits.
[Restores 15％ HP/CP+15]\nA standard fast food item. It's a hamburger. That's it.
[Restores 5％ HP/CP+40]\nA bitter hamburger suited to an adult palate.
[Restores 75％ HP/CP+60]\nOverly-luxurious pizza with four distinct flavors of cheese.
[Restores 50％ HP/CP+30]\nPizza piled high with delicious, melty cheese.
[Restores 5％ HP/CP+95]\nA pizza made from tomatoes, with tomatoes, for tomatoes.
[Restores 15％ HP/STR+25％]\nA simple, filling sandwich of just bread and ham.
[Restores 15％ HP]\nAn easy-to-make sandwich that fills an empty stomach.
[Restores 5％ HP/DEF+50％]\nA tough, chewy sandwich that improves one's resilience.
[Restores 80％ HP/Cures Ailments]\nAn opulent lunchbox jam-packed with love.
[Restores 40％ HP/Cures Ailments]\nA carefully-crafted lunchbox of colorful foods.
[Attack - STR 500 - Area (L) - Random Status (100％)]\nA lunchbox turned jack-in-the-box by unknown cosmic means.
[Restores 15％ HP/ATS+50％]\nLavish, nutritious soup that sharpens the senses.
[Restores 10％ HP/ATS+25％]\nWholesome potage that warms the body when consumed.
[Restores 5％ HP/ATS+25％/ADF+25％]\nAn odd, cold soup that clears the head when consumed.
[Restores 40％ HP/Restores 40％ EP/ATS+25％]\nMysterious candy that emanates a whimsical, glittering light.
[Restores 20％ HP/Restores 20％ EP]\nA popular treat from Mishelam that comes in many flavors.
[Restores 10％ HP/Restores 10％ EP/ATS+50％]\nCotton candy so mouth-curdlingly sour, it spikes the senses.
[Restores 60％ HP/ATS+50％/ADF+50％]\nA classy chocolate with a mature, nostalgic flavor.
[Restores 30％ HP/ATS+25％/ADF+25％]\nSmooth, melty chocolate to be eaten with a lover.
[Restores 50％ EP/Magic Reflect]\nLimited-edition chocolate with a glossy mirror finish.
[Restores 30％ HP/EVA+30％]\nSumptuous pudding that looks and melts like fresh snow.
[Restores 15％ HP/EVA+15％]\nSo tasty you have to stop yourself from eating too much.
[Restores 5％ HP/EVA+50％]\nIt wobbles around so much that it's legitimately hard to eat.
[Restores 40％ HP/Restores 20％ EP]\nA unique dessert that is as flavorful as it is colorful.
[Restores 20％ HP/Restores 10％ EP]\nGelato for those who can't settle on just one flavor.
[Revives & Restores 10％ HP/Restores 10％ EP]\nAbsurdly cold ice cream that jerks you back to your senses.
[Restores 30％ HP/SPD+25％/MOV+5]\nAn energizing super-snack that makes you want to move.
[Restores 30％ HP/MOV+3]\nAiry popcorn that eases a heavy heart.
[Restores 20％ HP/Stealth]\nPopcorn so light that the eater disappears along with it.
[Revive & Restores 40％ HP]\nTop-class, premium green tea with a faint, elegant sweetness.
[Revive & Restores 20％ HP]\nA rich matcha latte. Its ingredients were expertly chosen.
[CP+10/Cures Stat Down]\nA piercingly bitter, yet powerful medicinal tea.
[Restores 60％ HP/ACC+50％]\nFruit juice prepared with choice ingredients.
[Restores 30％ HP/ACC+50％]\nA delightfully sour juice that is 100％ fruit nectar.
[CP+30]\nA purple goo one should never put in their mouth. Never!
[Restores 20％ HP/Cures Sleep/Confuse/Faint]\nCappuccino with a fine scent. Restores muddled senses.
[Restores 10％ HP/Cures Sleep]\nA robust cappuccino. Helpful for staying awake.
[Restores 20％ EP]\nA brown goo one should never touch barehanded. Never!
[Revives & Restores 100％ HP]\nA cocktail that would make anyone feel they were in paradise.
[Revives & Restores 50％ HP]\nThe specialty of the popular Back Alley jazz bar, Garante.
[Restores All EP]\nA mouth-watering liquid that invites curiosity.
[CP+1]\nIf at first you don't succeed, try, try, try again.
[Restores 1 HP]\nCats love it a lot. Only for strays.
[Restores 2000 HP]\nA healing salve prepared by the Septian Church.
[Restores 5000 HP]\nA healing salve prepared by the Septian Church.
[Restores 10000 HP]\nA healing salve prepared by the Septian Church.
[Restores All HP]\nA healing salve prepared by the Septian Church.
[Restores 100 EP]\nA capsule filled with orbal energy.
[Restores 300 EP]\nAn enhanced capsule filled with orbal energy.
[Restores 500 EP]\nAn ultra-enhanced capsule filled with orbal energy.
[Revives & Restores 1000 HP]\nA salve that cures K.O. and restores 1000 HP.
[Revives & Restores 5000 HP]\nA salve that cures K.O. and restores 5000 HP.
[Revives & Restores 10000 HP]\nA salve that cures K.O. and restores 10000 HP.
[Revives & Restores All HP/CP+100]\nA powder that revives and restores all HP and 100 CP.
[Revives & Restores all HP/CP+200]\nA curative pill that revives and restores all HP and 200 CP.
[Cures Poison]\nA salve from St. Ursula Hospital that neutralizes poisons.
[Cures Petrify]\nAn ointment that softens petrified parts of the body.
[Cures Mute]\nA quick-fix tape to repair a neutralized orbment.
[Cures Freeze]\nA disposable packet that warms the whole body.
[Cures Seal]\nA gelatinous liquid that cures paralysis of the limbs.
[Cures Burn]\nA spray that cools burns rapidly with icy powder.
[Cures Blind]\nEye drops that cure sudden visual impairments.
[Cures Sleep]\nA mint-flavored candy that cures drowsiness when licked.
[Cures Faint]\nA salve from the Septian Church that restores consciousness.
[Cures Confuse]\nA salve from the Septian Church that restores alertness.
[Cures Stat Down]\nA pill that returns lowered attributes to normal.
[Cures Ailments]\nA salve that cures all ailments except K.O.
[Fill Burst Gauge]\nA mysterious jewel that fills around 1/3 of the Burst Gauge.
[Guaranteed Escape]\nAllows the party to retreat (can't use in certain battles).
[Analysis]\nAnalyzes and obtains information of an unknown enemy.
[Restores 2500 HP]\nA fluffy muffin prepared by KeA. Has a refreshing sweetness.
[Restores 1000 HP]\nOscar's newest creation. It's stuffed with a jammy egg.
[Restores 3000 HP]\nOscar's newest creation. Filled to the crust with cream.
[Restores 7500 HP]\nBennet's newest creation. The sweet result of her practice.
[Restores 15000 HP]\nOscar's newest creation. The juicy cutlet is rich with flavor.
[Restores 25000 HP]\nOscar's greatest creation. Made with a myriad of ingredients.
[Restores 500 HP/EP+50]\nA sweet red bean bun resembling Mishelam's beloved mascot.
[Restores 1500 HP/EP+150]\nA pink dumpling resembling Mishelam's elusive mascot.
[Restores 800 HP/CP+5]\nA sweet fruit juice that cools the body on its way down.
[Restores 200 HP/CP+10]\nA deep-flavored coffee. Sweeps exhaustion aside.
[Restores 3000 HP/CP+30]\nMiso soup served with rice. Hearty and energizing.
[Restores 2500 HP]\nMiso soup served with rice. Warms the body and soul.
[Restores 2000 HP/EP+250]\nRevitalizes a tired body in a pinch.
[Restores 5000 HP/CP+20]\nAn extremely bitter soft drink. It's an acquired taste.
